roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report
DEFT MOT ADVANCE CT DATE GLOBAL DISPO IN ALL DEFT CASES FILED

/CAL:RELEASE STATUS/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,//X:DEFENDANT TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE  (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIED BY SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/X:APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES:REMAIN AT HOUSING THROUGH RECOVERY SURVIVAL NETWORK/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:TRAILING FELONY CASE #21004326/DOP/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RECALL/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/ACMRVKD/BAIL: 1,000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SHER/CONTD: RELEASE STATUS (TRAILING# 21004326)/DOPC/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/FTRRECORDED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO ACM ON TUESDAY 10-12-21 TO GET ASSISTANCE INTO HR360, BAYSIDE, OR ANY PROGRAM DEEMED APPROPRIATE FOR DEFENDANT/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO ACM 3 TIMES A WEEK BY PHONE/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:KARINA VELASQUEZ VALERIO/SAORD4:100YARDS/SA2:1100 GOUGH ST, SF/SAORD4:25 YARDS/SAORD/CONTD:DEPT 12 TO JOIN 21004326/DOP/
/CAL: DEFENSE ADD TO CALENDAR FOR GLOBAL DISPOSITION/MO138572:21004326/
/FTRRECORDED/CAL:PRETRIAL/DAWT/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 12/TRANS 12:FORTHWITHTO JOIN 21004326 & ADDRESS SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/
